questionHtml:
The shortest distance, in kilometres, between any two towns is given in the table.

Hence find a lower bound for the travelling salesman problem.
markschemeHtml:
adding vertex G’s two shortest edges to their part (d)(ii)          (M1)

24+11+13

=48          A1

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: Hence find a lower bound for the travelling salesman problem.
